examples.text: الْمَنَاظِرُ الطَّبِيعِيَّةُ فِي هَٰذَا الْمَكَانِ مُثِيرَةٌ وَجَمِيلَةٌ جِدًّا.
examples.english: The natural scenery in this place is very exciting and beautiful.

etymology.text: Derived from the active participle of أَثَارَ (ʔaṯāra, “to arouse, to excite, to provoke, to stimulate, to irritate”), from the root ث و ر (ṯ w r); compare ثَارَ (ṯāra, “to be aroused”), ثَوْرَة (ṯawra, “excitement, uprising, revolution”).
